mission.title: argo: application resource can be applied in any namespace
mission.description: application resource can be applied in any namespace. Requested by 74+ users.

steps.title: Check current argo deployment
steps.description:
Verify your argo version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo
helm list -n argo 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working argo installation.

steps.title: Review argo configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant argo configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n argo -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo
kubectl get configmap -n argo -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo
```
We would like the ability for argoCD to recognise any `application` resource that has been applied across the cluster and not just within the namespace where ArgoCD has been deployed.

steps.title: Apply the fix for application resource can be applied in any namespace
steps.description:
I had some thoughts on this as well, and I think some of the major problems to solve are pointed out below:

**The relationship between AppProject and Application.**

 The AppProject provides governance to what an Application is allowed to do in the cluster, which repositories it may access etc. In
```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: AppProject
metadata:
  name: default
spec:
  applicationSources:
    - cluster: '*'
      namespace: '*'
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo
kubectl get events -n argo --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "application resource can be applied in any namespace" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
I had some thoughts on this as well, and I think some of the major problems to solve are pointed out below:

**The relationship between AppProject and Application.**

 The AppProject provides governance to what an Application is allowed to do in the cluster, which repositories it may access etc.
codeSnippets:
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: AppProject
metadata:
  name: default
spec:
  applicationSources:
    - cluster: '*'
      namespace: '*'

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with argo installed or the issue environment reproducible.
